title: Amtech T1895 100mm (4") Self-Locking hasp
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DURABLE: This 100mm (4") hasp has and integral self-locking mechanism and is made from strong zinc alloy and steel
VERSATILE: With a 40mm (1.6") hasp width, it is supplied with two keys and 6 screws and is ideal for low level, internal security applications such as display cabinets and storage units
INDOOR USE ONLY: This safety hasp is not suitable for outdoor use
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Indoor, low-security applications (e.g., display cabinets, storage units)
specifications_table.Included Components: Amtech T1895 100 mm Self Locking Hasp
